message:
test(sqlite): add regression tests for blocked cache unique constraint on close→claim flow

Covers beads_rust-m06q. The DELETE+INSERT pattern in insert_blocked_cache_entries
already prevents the UNIQUE violation; these tests exercise the exact scenario
(close blocker, immediately update newly-unblocked dependent) to prevent regression.

Also fixes missing workspace_health field in DoctorReport test constructors
and restores detect_anomalies method that was dropped during a stash conflict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
